auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Scott Mockford, CPA, CA)
economic_notes: Nation owns four subsidiaries: Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd. (Bobtail Construction), Akamihk Kanataskiy Ventures Ltd. (AKV), and Akamihk Energy Incorporated (AEI). AKV reported revenues of $8,776,384 and net earnings of $2,567,460. AEI reported revenues of $1,197,749 and net loss of $277,863. Nation is involved in treaty land entitlement negotiation. Community Benefits program received significant industry funding. Solar farm project involved.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022. The consolidated statement of change in net financial assets shows annual surplus of $8,275,864 which includes subsidiary earnings, while the statement of financial activities shows excess of revenue over expenditures of $5,901,924 for the government operations only. Four wholly-owned subsidiaries accounted for by equity method (not fully consolidated): Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd., Akamihk Kanataskiy Ventures Ltd., Akamihk Energy Incorporated. Large deferred revenue balance of $17,746,041 reflecting restricted funding. Significant CMHC funding of $5,790,699 for 20 new homes project. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond individual partner Scott Mockford CPA CA at 11210-107 Avenue NW Edmonton. Prior year accumulated surplus opening balance discrepancy noted between Schedule 1 ($33,196,197) and Note 15 ($33,196,197). Education expenses calculated as Post Secondary $361,306 + Community School $34,200 + Summer Students $60,636 = $456,142. Social expenses include Preventative Social Services $226,120 + Social Services $2,756,470 = $2,982,590. No schedule of remuneration provided.
